name: RedNote MCP
what_it_does: MCP server that provides AI agents with access to Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book / RedNote) content, enabling keyword-based note search and note retrieval via URL through browser-based cookie authentication.
use_cases: Search Xiaohongshu notes by keyword for market research on Chinese consumer trends
Retrieve and analyze specific XiaoHongShu posts for content research
Monitor product reviews and lifestyle content on China's leading social commerce platform
Enable AI assistants to access Chinese social media content for translation or analysis workflows
Automate content discovery on Xiaohongshu for influencer marketing research
not_for: Posting, liking, or commenting on Xiaohongshu
Users without a Xiaohongshu account (manual login required for setup)
High-frequency automation at scale — cookie-based auth may be rate-limited or blocked
best_when: You need an AI assistant to access Xiaohongshu content and are comfortable with a one-time browser-based login setup.
avoid_when: You need write access, official API access, or robust authentication that doesn't rely on browser cookie persistence.

auth.notes: Initialization opens a browser via Playwright, navigates to Xiaohongshu login page, requires manual user login, then saves cookies to ~/.mcp/rednote/cookies.json. Cookie persistence used for subsequent sessions.

pricing.notes: Open source. Requires a Xiaohongshu account (free). Xiaohongshu does not have a public API — cookie scraping may violate ToS.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: No documented error handling; cookie expiry is a known failure mode with no documented recovery path
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Read-only search and retrieval operations; safe to retry
known_agent_gotchas: Cookie-based auth will expire and require manual re-login — not suitable for unattended agents
No official API means this relies on web scraping which can break without notice on platform changes
Playwright dependency requires browser installation (npx playwright install) which adds setup friction
Limited to search and URL retrieval — no structured data access or pagination documented
Potential ToS violation using cookie scraping on Xiaohongshu
